description: A minimalist designed quote card consisting of a block of dark serif text on a plain white background, with a thin gray vertical scrollbar visible at the right edge (styled to look like an excerpt or screenshot). The full text reads: 'The Trump Administration is standing by our commitment to end practices that leave Americans in the dust. As we reestablish economic dominance, we must protect our most valuable resource: the American worker. Launching Project Firewall will help us ensure no employers are abusing H-1B visas at the expense of our workforce,' said U.S. Secretary of Labor Lori Chavez-DeRemer. 'By rooting out fraud and abuse, the Department of Labor and our federal partners will ensure that highly skilled jobs go to Americans first.' There are no photographs, seals, or decorative elements; the content is text only.
notable_text: '...we must protect our most valuable resource: the American worker. Launching Project Firewall will help us ensure no employers are abusing H-1B visas...' - Secretary of Labor Lori Chavez-DeRemer
